protected_action_catalog.description: Release of an outbound payment for settlement.

risk_boundary.rationale: Funds leave the controlled boundary irreversibly.

protected_action_catalog.description: Approve a new vendor to the procurement allowlist.
Export of a designated customer dataset to an external sink.

risk_boundary.rationale: Triggers external disclosure of regulated records.

protected_action_catalog.description: Promote a release artifact into the production environment.
Rotation of a long-lived administrative secret.

risk_boundary.rationale: Mis-rotation can lock out administrative recovery.

control_crosswalk.control_objective: Declare the closed set of protected actuators that this profile mediates.

claim.scope_text: ProofRail evidence may inform whether a protected actuator declaration is present for payment.release.

control_crosswalk.control_objective: Show that protected-action attempts traverse the declared gateway.

claim.scope_text: Composed-gateway evidence may show mediation of vendor.approve through the declared gateway.

control_crosswalk.control_objective: Show that protected-action attempts are bound to observable trace events.

claim.scope_text: Silver trace-binding may show trace coverage for data.export.

control_crosswalk.control_objective: Record a relying-party acceptance decision against composed gateway evidence.

claim.scope_text: A relying-party acceptance record may support a downstream review of deploy.change scope.

control_crosswalk.control_objective: Record post-acceptance review triggers and recommended local posture.

claim.scope_text: Drill records may inform a later review of admin.rotate_secret governance scope.

control_limitations.summary: ProofRail v0.3.6 supplies machine-checkable evidence only; it does not decide control adequacy.
External framework references are example-only and do not imply mapping sufficiency.
Catalog and crosswalk are version-bound and are not a perpetual statement.

dependency_references.relationship_note: v0.3.6 catalog and crosswalk presume v0.3.5 policy-pack semantics.

scope_limitations: This package is example data; it does not anchor a production reliance decision.
Action IDs are illustrative; downstream relying parties define their own protected action surface.
non_claims: v0.3.6 does not claim compliance with any framework including SOC 2, ISO, NIST, PCI, or HIPAA.
v0.3.6 does not claim certification, audit readiness, or auditor approval.
v0.3.6 does not claim regulator approval or production authorization.
v0.3.6 does not claim control design effectiveness or operating effectiveness.
v0.3.6 does not claim legal enforceability or transferred trust.
v0.3.6 does not claim runtime truth or governed reliance; Gold governance remains a later release boundary.
